BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/ENGLISHNOBILITYMEDIEVAL3D-K.htm#RalphGreystokedied1323 as of 7/13/2016

WILLIAM de Greystoke (Grimthorpe 6 Jan 1321-Brancepeth 10 Jul 1359).  Lord Greystoke. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Greystoke於1321年1月6日出生在英國越可爾格利斯索普時，他的父親Ralph Greystoke21歲，母親Alice de Audley22歲。他於大約1341年與Lucy de Lucy結婚。他於1323年住在英國波藍德格斯托可。他於1342年登記服兵役。他去世於1359年7月10日在英國達勒姆布朗加斯享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Greystoke was born on 6 January 1321, in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, his father, Ralph Greystoke, was 21 and his mother, Alice de Audley, was 22. He married Lucy de Lucy about 1341. He lived in Greystoke, Cumberland, England in 1323. He registered for military service in 1342. He died on 10 July 1359, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Greystoke est né le 6 janvier 1321, à Grimesthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Greystoke, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice de Audley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lucy de Lucy environ 1341. Il a vécu à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre en 1323. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1342. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1359, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Greystoke am 6. Januar 1321 in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Greystoke 21 und seine Mutter Alice de Audley 22. Er hat um 1341 Lucy de Lucy geheiratet. 1323 hat er in Greystoke, Cumberland, England gelebt. Er hat sich 1342 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 10. Juli 1359 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Brancepeth, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Greystoke è nato il il 6 gennaio 1321 nel Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Greystoke, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Audley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lucy de Lucy circa 1341. Vissuto a Greystoke, Cumberland, England nel 1323. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1342. Morì il 10 luglio 1359, nel Brancepeth, Durham, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Greystokeが1321年1月6日にイギリスヨークシュアイアグリメスソルペで生まれた時，父Ralph Greystokeは21歳，母Alice de Audleyは22歳であった。約1341年にLucy de Lucyと結婚した。彼は1323年にはイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクに住んでいた。彼は1342年に兵役登録をした。彼は1359年7月10日にイギリスダルハムブランセペスで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Greystoke(이)가 1321년 1월 6일 영국 요르크실르 그라임스소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Greystoke(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Audley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1341년 Lucy de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 1323년도에 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 살았다. 그는 1342년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1359년 7월 10일 영국 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Greystoke nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1321, em Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Greystoke, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Audley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy de Lucy aproximadamente 1341. Ele viveu em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra em 1323. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1342. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1359, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ro.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Greystoke родился 6 января 1321 г. в местности гриместаурп, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Greystoke было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Audley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy de Lucy около 1341 г. Он жил в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия в 1323 году. В 1342 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 10 июля 1359 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.
